title: cota coelopoda
intro: Cota coelopoda, also known as mountain cornflower or Alpine cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Cota coelopoda has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cota coelopoda include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
